case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. $2,396.00 US CURRENCY-PROPERTY SUBJECT TO et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT $2,396.00 US CURRENCY-PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-24-2007 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
POS OF ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FILED BY PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
NOTICE OF COMPLIANCE WITH ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION, FILED BY WILLIE HILL, CLAIMANT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,200.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT WILLIE HILL. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,196.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
